full_text:
Shi Ji (Gongxu) 施績 (公緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Ji (施績), styledGongxu (公緒). He defended Jiangling from the Wei general Wang Chang and was known for his courage and bravery. Shi Ji was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Shi Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
